name: wp-theme-base
description: Foundational WordPress theme with Tailwind CSS (JIT)

scripts.build: wp-scripts build src/js/main.js --output-path=assets/js && postcss src/css/main.css -o assets/css/main.css && postcss src/css/editor.css -o assets/css/editor.css
scripts.start: concurrently "wp-scripts start src/js/main.js --output-path=assets/js" "postcss src/css/main.css -o assets/css/main.css --watch" "postcss src/css/editor.css -o assets/css/editor.css --watch"
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css
